# NOI

> NOI turns rental rooftops into recurring revenue. We finance and install solar, meter tenant consumption, and bill on your behalf — built for US landlords, property developers, BTR operators, and HOAs. Zero capex.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What NOI is and the live revenue calculator.
- [Economics](/economics): How much NOI a rooftop adds — modeled per unit, per building, per portfolio.
- [Process](/process): The 4-step path from utility bill to first monthly payout (~60 days).

- [Pricing](/pricing): Starter, Growth, and Portfolio tiers. Performance-aligned.
- [Partners](/partners): For solar installers, loan brokers, builders & developers.
- [FAQ](/faq): Legality, financing, tenant payments, regulation, timelines.
- [Team](/team): The people behind NOI.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a tailored revenue estimate.
- [Blog](/blog): 20+ technical posts on rooftop solar for rental property NOI.
